title: Work Emails

addModal.title: Add a work email
addModal.personalDomainError: This domain is on our personal-email blocklist. Please use the email at your employer.
addModal.alreadyHeldError: This email is already in use by another HubUser.

verifyPage.title: Enter the 6-digit code
verifyPage.subtitle: We sent a code to {{email}}. The code expires in 24 hours.
verifyPage.wrongCodeError: That code didn't match. Please try again.

removeConfirm: Remove this work email? You can always re-add it later, but doing so will require a fresh verification.

success.added: Verification code sent. Check your inbox.
success.resent: A fresh code has been sent.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load your work emails.
errors.addFailed: Could not add this work email.
errors.verifyFailed: Could not verify this work email.
errors.removeFailed: Could not remove this work email.
errors.reverifyFailed: Could not re-verify this work email.

emptyState: You haven't added any work emails yet. Add the email at your current employer to connect with verified colleagues.
